hook.text: ARIMA handles trends but not seasons. SARIMA adds seasonal terms — because January always matters for January forecasts.

buildup.text: SARIMA adds a second set of parameters (P,D,Q) that operate at the seasonal frequency — typically 12 for monthly data.

discovery.text: Seasonal differencing subtracts the value from the same month last year. This removes the repeating pattern.

twist.text: SARIMA models can have up to 7 parameters to tune. Overfitting is a real risk with complex seasonal models.

climax.text: For monthly and quarterly data with clear seasonality, SARIMA remains one of the most effective tools available.

punchline.text: Add seasonal terms to ARIMA and the calendar comes alive in the model.

quiz.question: How does SARIMA differ from standard ARIMA?
options: It adds a second set of parameters that model repeating seasonal patterns at fixed intervals
It only works for annual data
